email.assignment.subject: [{{projectKey}}] Work item #{{itemNumber}} assigned to you: {{title}}
email.assignment.intro: {{assignerName}} assigned a work item to you in {{projectName}}:
email.assignment.footer: You received this email because you have assignment notifications enabled for this project. You can change your notification preferences in your Taskwondo settings.
email.watcher.subject: [{{projectKey}}] #{{itemNumber}} updated: {{title}}
email.watcher.intro: {{actorName}} updated a work item you are watching:
email.watcher.footer: You received this email because you are watching this work item and have watcher notifications enabled. You can change your notification preferences in your Taskwondo settings.
email.new_item.subject: [{{projectKey}}] New {{type}} created: {{displayId}} {{title}}
email.new_item.intro: A new {{type}} was created in your project:
email.new_item.footer: You received this email because you have new item notifications enabled for this project. You can change your notification preferences in your Taskwondo settings.
email.status_change.subject: [{{projectKey}}] #{{itemNumber}} status changed to {{newStatus}}: {{title}}
email.status_change.intro: {{actorName}} changed the status of a work item assigned to you:
email.status_change.footer: You received this email because you have status change notifications enabled for assigned items. You can change your notification preferences in your Taskwondo settings.
email.comment_assigned.subject: [{{projectKey}}] New comment on #{{itemNumber}}: {{title}}
email.comment_assigned.intro: {{commenterName}} commented on a work item assigned to you:
email.comment_assigned.footer: You received this email because you have comment notifications enabled for assigned items. You can change your notification preferences in your Taskwondo settings.
email.member_added.subject: You've been added to project {{projectName}}
email.member_added.intro: {{addedByName}} added you to the project {{projectName}} as a {{role}}.
email.member_added.footer: You received this email because you have project membership notifications enabled. You can change your notification preferences in your Taskwondo settings.
email.invite.subject: You've been invited to project {{projectName}}
email.invite.intro: {{inviterName}} invited you to join the project {{projectName}} as a {{role}}.
email.invite.footer: You received this email because someone invited you to a Taskwondo project. If you don't recognize this invite, you can safely ignore this email.
